chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. App. No. S – 556 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 21.05.2024 Mr. Muhammad Aslam Jatoi, Assistant Attorney General..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Aijaz Ali, Sub-Inspector FIA, Shaheed Benazirabad is present and submits that if applicant approaches them, they would entertain his complainant and would enquire into it in accordance with law. No one is present on behalf of the applicant, however, in the light of undertaking given by aforesaid Sub-Inspector that in case applicant approaches them, they would entertain his complaint and enquire into it in accordance with law, this application, having served its purpose, is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E Abdul Basit
